component.name: Nocky
component.summary: A native local and YouTube Music player for Linux

description.p: Nocky is a native GTK4 and libadwaita music player with local album and artist browsing, playlists, liked songs, synchronized lyrics, a real-time audio spectrum, MPRIS integration and optional YouTube Music catalogue/account access.
Separates local and YouTube Music modes, removes eager playlist loading, and improves browser responsiveness.
Adds an automatic YouTube Music startup sync and refreshes the library home, album and artist browsing views.
Adds persistent YouTube library and stream caches, queue prefetching, and high-definition artwork.
Fixes YouTube runtime discovery and adds a saved startup choice between the local library and YouTube Music.
Synchronizes the connected YouTube Music library into the native albums, artists, playlists and liked-songs interface.
Adds optional YouTube Music search, account library, liked songs, playlists and GStreamer stream playback.
First official public beta of Nocky.
